description: A commit control whose stitched boundary tightens to indicate readiness and settles after activation.

a11y.reducedMotion: Replace path and compression motion with immediate border-weight and label changes.
a11y.keyboardContract: Uses native button behavior. Enter and Space activate; focus-visible receives a persistent outline.
a11y.nonVisualEquivalent: Loading, success, and error states are announced through text and aria-live messaging.
